name: Xandire's Truthseekers
inspire: After a Power step, if any friendly fighters (excluding Taros) are slain, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Raptor's Eye
reactions.rulesText: After another friendly fighter Moves, push a friendly Taros up to 3 hexes. After this push, Taros must be within 2 hexes of that fighter.

reactions.name: Seeker's Strike
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack if the target was on a feature token.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack if the target was on a feature token. Flip that feature token. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: Blaze of Light
abilities.flavorText: The Lantern Astrala blinds and disorients the impure.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step if your leader ({icon:leader}) is on the battlefield. Enemy fighters' weapons have -1 Attack dice in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Blazing Purity
abilities.flavorText: In a last burst of holy light, Calthia seeks to aid her fellow warriors.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your leader ({icon:leader}) is slain. Pick up to 2 friendly fighters and heal each fighter, or pick 1 friendly fighter and heal that fighter twice instead. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Blazing Force
abilities.flavorText: Even as he falls, Dhoraz exhorts his companions to greater deeds.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly Dhoraz is slain. Pick up to 2 friendly fighters and push each fighter 1 hex, or pick 1 friendly fighter and push that fighter up to 2 hexes instead. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Blazing Reprisal
abilities.flavorText: Though her demeanour is often mistaken as cold and uncaring, Luxa's will to aid her comrades burns hot.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly Luxa is slain, before removing them from the battlefield. That fighter Attacks with a ranged weapon (excluding Upgrades). You can only use this ability once per game.
